title: [Ursine Emporium, Back Room]
description: Partitioned by a drape of heavy violet canvas, the backroom is quieter than the entry room of the shop, its corners touched by the steady glow of low-burning lamps.  Niveous shelves line the walls, holding spools of dyed leather, bolts of thick fabric, and shallow trays filled with polished metal fittings.  A central worktable bears signs of recent use, with chalk markings, loose threads, and measuring cords strewn across its surface.  The air carries the scent of wax, wool, and well-oiled hide.
